gh_935109dffc5ad7dd99644c28.title: SDET - QA Engineer - HCMC
gh_935109dffc5ad7dd99644c28.description:
We are now looking for a Software QA Development Engineer; you will collaborate with multi-functional groups and be responsible for test planning, execution, and reporting, you will also write scripts to automate testing, design and develop tools for QA team, or develop integration tests for validation. 

What you’ll be doing: 
• Review product requirements and develop test matrix. 
• Build test plan, design test case, execute and report test progress, bugs, and results to management. 
• Automate test cases and assist in the architecture, crafting and implementing of test frameworks. 
• Manage bug lifecycle and co-work with inter-groups to drive for solutions. 
• In-house repro and verify customer issues/fixes. 

What we need to see: 
• 2+ years QA experience. 
• Proficient in Unix/Linux and shell/python programming skills. 
• Rich experience in test cases development, tests automation in API/UI and failure analysis. 
• Solid experience with AI development tools, including creating test cases, automating test cases
• Good knowledge and hands-on experience in model testing and LLM benchmarking 
• Good QA sense including attention to detail, problem-solving, data analysis, quality standards knowledge, time management etc. 
• Excellent communicator, fluent written and verbal English. 

Contact: +84353697487 (Zalo/ WhatsApp) for more details and further process

gh_9334c8ca82a55cfcd2535c76.title: Junior Backend Engineer 後端工程師
gh_9334c8ca82a55cfcd2535c76.description:
## 工作地點
台北市松山區

## 工作內容

1. 負責既有系統的新功能開發，維護與優化及資料庫的設計。
2. 負責開發項目、測試與發佈，並追蹤異常，修正程式。
3. 協助系統重構、專案技術方案分析、規劃、整合優化等相關工作。

## 能力需求
1. 具備1年以上程式開發經驗；
2. 熟悉Java、SQL，及 JavaEE 軟體開發技術（Servlet、JSP 等）；
3. 熟悉Spring、Spring MVC、Hibernate等Framework；
4. 熟悉Git、Maven、Tomcat；
5. 熟悉 RDBMS，目前主要使用 (DB2、PostgreSQL)。

### 加分
1. 團隊合作，與團隊一同研究新技術，並評估導入的可能性；
2. 具備獨立思考能力，喜歡參與討論並互相交流見解；
3. 熟悉 linux、MVC架構、開源框架使用，例如但不限於 ZK、Struts等；
4. 熟悉 JavaScript(ES6+)、TypeScript、Html 5、CSS。
6. 瞭解jQuery、SCSS。 

## 薪資範圍
面議【年薪約600K~800K】

## 其他
1. 彈性上下班，不用趕九點打卡，組織扁平，人性化管理。
2. 全新裝潢工作環境、全公司人體工學升降桌。
3. 生日假、生日禮金、旅遊補助、旅遊假、每月免費員工按摩服務、員工聚餐、免費在職進修課程等等。

## 聯絡方式
張小姐
Mail：emma.chang@imc.com.tw 
Line：emmachang.sa

gh_93a18d82604a9afdc130e4b5.title: [PRESENCIAL] [SAO PAULO] Dev Javascript React Native + Node.js Sênior na IMPULSO
gh_93a18d82604a9afdc130e4b5.description:
<!--

-->

#### Buscamos Devs Javascript que possuam muita expertise em React Native e NodeJS!

Se você tem **experiência prática** em **React Native, Styled Components, Context API, Apollo, GraphQL+NodeJS**, esta oportunidade pode ser sua!
Será considerado um **super diferencial** ter experiência também com **Java** e **Swift**!

Nível: **Sênior**
Duração: **6 meses**, com grande chance de extensão
Modelo: **Presencial (Alphaville - Barueri - SP)**
Carga horária: **Full Time**, em horário comercial
Início: **Imediato**
Remuneração: **até R$110/h (~R$17.600/mês).** 💰 A própria pessoa define quanto julga ser adequado receber.

😃 **Sobre nós:** Somos uma **comunidade** com milhares de **profissionais de TI** que integra diversas **iniciativas, produtos e serviços** para a **colaboração mútua e desenvolvimento** pessoal e profissional de seus integrantes. **Já somos mais 10 mil pessoas!**

**Tem interesse e disponibilidade imediata?** Acesse o link https://impulser.me/thays-impulso, entre para a comunidade e me chame diretamente por lá (logo após registrar-se, você receberá por email as credenciais para acessar o nosso chat). Lá na comunidade, eu sou @thays. É só chamar! 😉

Aguardo vocês! 🚀
